title: wilsonia humilis
intro: Wilsonia humilis, also known as the dwarf Wilsonia or narrowleaf Wilsonia, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wilsonia humilis are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Wilsonia humilis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and some herbalists also use it in salves and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
